title: Middle Eastern Rose Wrap
description: A delicious and refreshing Middle Eastern-inspired wrap filled with crispy vegetables, fragrant rose petals, and crunchy almonds.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Place the sliced cucumber, tomato, and red onion in the pan.
Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the vegetables are slightly tender.
Add the sliced almonds and cook for an additional minute.
In a separate bowl, mix together the chopped parsley, rose petals, and tzatziki sauce.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the parsley-rose mixture on the wrap, followed by the cooked vegetables and almonds.
Fold the wrap in half and serve immediately.
